title: Fast and Beautiful
description: Optimised, a little bit more. The flagship modpack from Tsuuka.
body:
# Fast and Beautiful

Optimised, a little bit more.

> **NEWS:** We've switched our framework from our own to Simply Optimized. This allows better optimisation while keeping our special mod selection that sets us apart.


<details>
<summary>Supported Versions</summary>

- 1.21
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.5
- 1.21.8

</details>



## About

Fast and Beautiful is a modpack that lets you have an amazing-looking game while keeping superb performance.

Each mod in this pack has been hand-picked for maximum performance. As said, I have also made it look pretty good, with built-in shader support and some mod cross-compatibility.

I use this pack every time I play because of its features. I have never encountered issues with the current release version.

Not only that, but I will also make sure to keep it up to date with the latest versions of Minecraft, as soon as all the mod dependencies have been double-checked.

After testing it on my low-end laptop, I got a consistent 60 frames, for a 15-year-old laptop - amazing! Bringus (Studios) would be proud.


## Installation

**First Path: Downloading Automatically**

1. Make sure you have a Modrinth pack browsing and installing Minecraft launcher. (Modrinth App, Prism Launcher)
2. Add a new instance by looking up Fast and Beautiful on the Modrinth search function

**Second Path: Downloading Manually**

1. Make sure you have a Modrinth-pack compatible Minecraft launcher. (Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, MultiMC)
2. Download the pack with the .mrpack file on the side of your screen.
3. Run the file.
4. You should see some install pop up. Follow the steps.
5. Congratulations! You now have Fast and Beautiful installed.
